# Sanjay Km - Full Stack Developer & Sanjay Flow Platform

Information about the professional portfolio of Sanjay Km and the Sanjay Flow Meta Application.

## Professional Profile
- **Name:** Sanjay Km
- **Role:** Full Stack Developer, Freelancer, Automation Services Provider
- **Location:** Kozhikode, Kochi, Kerala, India, Bangalore
- **Contact Email:** contact@sanjaykm.com
- **Contact Phone:** +91 8547863419
- **Main Website:** https://www.sanjaykm.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/sanjay-k-m
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/sanjay-k-m
- **Twitter:** https://x.com/_sanjay_km

## Skills & Stack
- **Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Python
- **Frontend Frameworks:** React.js, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, ShadCN UI
- **Backend & APIs:** Node.js, Express.js, Django, FastAPI, REST APIs, WebSockets
- **Databases & Cloud Storage:** MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Firebase, AWS S3
- **DevOps & Infrastructure:** Jenkins, n8n, Docker, AWS (EC2, S3), Nginx, Linux, Git, Postman, CI/CD pipelines
- **Specialized Systems:** Meta WhatsApp Business API (Sanjay Flow), Biometric Authentication, Active Directory, workflow automation

## Meta Application: Sanjay Flow
- **Description:** A cloud-based WhatsApp Business API and WhatsApp Flows integration platform.
- **Developer:** Sanjay Km
- **Compliance Link:** https://www.sanjaykm.com/privacy-policy
- **Features:** Custom message routing, interactive forms (WhatsApp Flows), webhook handlers, backend automation pipelines.

## Project Portfolios
- **PoshWatch:** Bespoke, high-performance luxury product catalog developed for a premium retailer in Kochi (https://www.poshwatch.in). Focused on a sophisticated minimalist interface to showcase watches and accessories.
- **Trade Fusion Corporate Website:** UAE-based trading company site. Built with Bootstrap and Firebase Firestore/Storage. Includes a category/product admin panel.
- **Zylera Ecommerce:** Scalable ecommerce platform built with Next.js, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, and Sanity CMS. Integrated with Razorpay.
- **HRMS Platform:** Employee management dashboard built with MERN stack and Electron.js for Domain Enroll. Incorporates attendance tracking, biometrics, and RBAC security.
- **Realtime Chat App:** Full-stack MERN WebSocket application with persistent chat history.
